additional_rules.name: hardcoded-color-class
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded color class — use theme tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, etc.)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace bg-white with bg-background, bg-black with bg-foreground, bg-gray-* with bg-muted or bg-accent, text-white with text-primary-foreground, text-black with text-foreground, text-gray-* with text-muted-foreground.

additional_rules.name: tailwind-font-size-class
additional_rules.message: Tailwind font-size class — use inline style={{ fontSize }} with the project type scale
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace text-sm / text-lg / etc. with style={{ fontSize: '0.875rem' }} or the appropriate project type scale value.

additional_rules.name: import-order-violation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Reorder imports: 1) react/react-*, 2) third-party packages, 3) @/app/components/shared, 4) relative imports (./ ../).
additional_rules._note: Import order is structural (not single-line grep). Engine delegates to layer-2 linter or agent check. This rule serves as documentation for the convention.
